content: " Newspapers owned by NZME said they would comply with the order and not run the ad again, but Ross said that the party would not comply with the ruling and that the ASA should not try to interfere in election debate and free speech
summary: " Newspapers owned by NZME said they would comply with the order and not run the ad again, but Ross said that the party would not comply with the ruling and that the ASA should not try to interfere in election debate and free speech
